loop_steps.rule_evaluation: director.loadScene('GameScene') called; LevelLoader.load(levelId) resolves with LevelConfig; TileGrid.initialize(rows, cols) called; BoardGenerator.generateFromConfig(levelConfig) places tiles; ComboTracker reset; GameSession transitions loading→playing
loop_steps.state_change: GameSession.state == 'playing'; TileGrid populated with even-count tile pairs; movesRemaining set to LevelConfig.max_moves
loop_steps.feedback: scene fade-in via SystemOverlay; NPC dialog slides in from bottom with chapter narrative text; BGM cross-fades to chapter theme
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-01: all board tiles visible within 528×528 board area; GameHUD labels visible (movesLabel shows max_moves value, objectiveProgressBar at 0%); NPC dialog panel visible at bottom; no tile clips outside Board node boundary
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert TileGrid.getRawGrid() has zero cells with TileType.NONE (all cells filled); assert movesRemaining === LevelConfig.max_moves; assert GameSession.state === 'playing'; assert countMatchablePairs(grid) >= MIN_MATCHABLE_PAIRS (5)

loop_steps.player_action: tap tile at grid position (col, row) — player taps anywhere within the 66×66 px design-space cell of the target tile
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: input hit-test converts canvas touch point to board-local coord using formula: col = floor((touch_x + board_w/2) / tile_w), row = floor((board_h/2 - touch_y) / tile_h); board_offset (-30 from canvas center) applied; TileCell.isSelected set to true; TileCell must have type != TileType.NONE and isLocked == false and isObstacle == false; ice_block cells (isObstacle==true with obstacleType==ICE_BLOCK) reject selection but path traversal is still allowed
loop_steps.state_change: selected tile: TileCell.isSelected = true; no other tile previously selected → first-selection state; movesRemaining unchanged
loop_steps.feedback: tile border highlight ring rendered (coral_warm #E8866A glow ring at ≥ 60% tile area); SFX: tile_select sound plays; animation: tile scale 1.0→1.1→1.0 bounce (0.15s)
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-02: exactly one tile shows visible highlight ring; highlight ring is distinct from unselected tile borders; ring is at the tapped grid position; movesLabel unchanged from sc-01
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert exactly one TileCell has isSelected === true; assert selected tile type !== TileType.NONE; assert selected tile isLocked === false; assert selected tile isObstacle === false OR obstacleType !== ObstacleType.WOODEN_CRATE

loop_steps.player_action: tap a second tile of the SAME type as tile_a within the same game turn
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: src.type === dst.type required; TileMatcher.findPath(grid, r1, c1, r2, c2) called — BFS with turns ≤ 2; isPassable returns false for wooden_crate and water_current cells; path may traverse out-of-bounds (perimeter) cells; path result != null indicates valid match; if path result === null, tile_b selection is rejected and tile_a remains selected
loop_steps.state_change: TileMatcher.findPath returns path[] of Points; both tile_a and tile_b cells will be cleared; ComboTracker.onTileMatched() called; GameSession.onMoveMade(comboLevel) called → movesRemaining--; TileGrid.clearTile(r1,c1) and clearTile(r2,c2) called; TileGrid emits TILES_MATCHED event with path; ObstacleManager.onTileMatched([pos_a, pos_b]) called for obstacle side-effects
loop_steps.feedback: connection line drawn on TileConnectLine layer following the ≤2-bend path (visible for 0.3s); tile disappear VFX burst at both tile positions; movesLabel decrements by 1; objectiveProgressBar increments; if ComboTracker.comboCount >= 2: comboLabel shows 'x{n}  {m}×' with bounce animation and glow ring; SFX: match_success; if combo >= 2: SFX combo_lv1/lv2/lv3
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-03: connection line visible between tile_a and tile_b following ≤2-bend path; both tiles in cleared state (cells empty); movesLabel decremented by 1 vs sc-02; no orphan connection line after 0.5s (sc-04)
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert TileMatcher.findPath result !== null; assert cleared cells have type === TileType.NONE after match; assert movesRemaining === (prev_movesRemaining - 1); assert TILES_MATCHED event was emitted with path length >= 2; assert connection line node is inactive or removed after match animation completes (< 0.5s)

loop_steps.player_action: tap a second tile of the SAME type that has NO valid ≤2-bend path to tile_a
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: TileMatcher.findPath returns null; game rejects match; no state change to board; tile_a selection may reset or tile_b becomes new selection depending on implementation
loop_steps.state_change: no tiles cleared; movesRemaining unchanged; isSelected state may transfer to tile_b as new first-select or both tiles deselected
loop_steps.feedback: brief red flash / shake on tile_a or tile_b; SFX: invalid_select or error tone; no connection line drawn; no combo increment
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-05: neither tile_a nor tile_b has been removed from board; movesLabel unchanged vs sc-02; no connection line visible
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert TileMatcher.findPath === null; assert both tile cells still have type !== TileType.NONE; assert movesRemaining unchanged

loop_steps.player_action: tap a tile of DIFFERENT type than tile_a
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: TileMatcher.findPath returns null early because src.type !== dst.type guard triggers; match rejected
loop_steps.state_change: no tiles cleared; tile_a deselected or tile_b becomes new first-select
loop_steps.feedback: tile_a selection ring removed; tile_b shows no highlight (or brief deselect flash); no SFX match; no combo
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-06: tile_a cell still present; tile_b cell still present; no highlight on either tile within 0.5s
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert TileMatcher returns null due to type mismatch; assert no tiles cleared; assert movesRemaining unchanged

loop_steps.player_action: player completes a second valid match within 2000ms of the previous match
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: ComboTracker.onTileMatched(): elapsed = Date.now() - lastMatchTime; if elapsed < COMBO_WINDOW_MS (2000ms) comboCount = min(comboCount+1, COMBO_MAX=6); multiplier = COMBO_MULTIPLIERS[threshold]: {1:1.0, 2:1.5, 3:2.0, 4+:3.0}; emits COMBO_CHANGED(count, multiplier); if comboCount reaches auto-generation threshold: WAVE at 6, LIGHT_CHAIN at 4, CASCADE at 3
loop_steps.state_change: ComboTracker.comboCount incremented; ComboTracker.lastMatchTime updated; if threshold crossed: special tile spawned on board by caller
loop_steps.feedback: comboLabel updates to 'x{n}  {m}×' format; comboLabel color changes per COMBO_GLOW_COLORS array (lv1=brand_primary, lv2=brand_secondary, lv3=brand_warm, lv4=gold); comboGlowNode animates with matching tint; SFX: combo_lv1 at ≥2, combo_lv2 at ≥3, combo_lv3 at ≥4; combo-popup animation plays on comboLabel
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-07: comboLabel visible at y=+520 design-space with 'x{n}  {m}×' text; comboLabel color matches COMBO_GLOW_COLORS[comboCount-1]; glow ring visible on comboGlowNode; tile board shows both pairs cleared
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert ComboTracker.comboCount >= 2; assert ComboTracker.getMultiplier() returns 1.5 at combo=2, 2.0 at combo=3, 3.0 at combo>=4; assert comboLabel.string matches pattern /x\d+\s+\d+\.\d+×/; assert COMBO_CHANGED event was emitted with correct count and multiplier

loop_steps.player_action: player makes a valid tile match adjacent to an ice_block obstacle cell
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: ObstacleManager._handleAdjacentIceBlock: for each adjacent cardinal direction to matched positions, if obs.kind === 'ice_block' then obs.layers--; if obs.layers <= 0 then obstacle removed and cell freed; ice_block initial layers = 2 (set by BoardGenerator.makeObstacleCell); ice_block does NOT block path traversal (TileMatcher.isPassable allows empty ice cells); ice_block DOES block tile selection (cell.isObstacle = true)
loop_steps.state_change: adjacent ice_block obs.layers decremented; if layers reaches 0: obstacle removed from obstacleMap, TileGrid cell updated with isObstacle=false/isLocked=false; tile at that cell becomes selectable
loop_steps.feedback: ice crack overlay sprite transitions to next damage state (2-layer→1-layer crack art, then cleared); VFX: ice shatter particles on final removal; SFX: ice_crack or ice_shatter
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-08: ice_block cell shows cracked layer-2 overlay after first adjacent match; sc-09: ice_block fully removed after second adjacent match, tile underneath visible and selectable
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert ObstacleManager.getObstacleAt({row,col}) returns obs with layers=1 after first adjacent match (was layers=2); assert getObstacleAt returns null after second adjacent match; assert TileGrid.getTile returns cell with isObstacle===false after removal

loop_steps.player_action: player attempts to draw a path through a wooden_crate cell
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: TileMatcher.isPassable returns false for cells with isObstacle=true AND obstacleType===ObstacleType.WOODEN_CRATE; path cannot route through wooden_crate; ObstacleManager.isPathBlocked returns true for wooden_crate cells in path
loop_steps.state_change: no path through wooden_crate; player must find alternate path or match cannot be made if only route is blocked
loop_steps.feedback: path-finding fails for routes through crate; no connection line; tile_a selection persists or is cleared based on whether any valid path exists
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-10: match attempt with only route through wooden_crate shows no connection line; wooden_crate cell shows distinctive crate overlay; tiles not cleared
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert TileMatcher.findPath returns null when only BFS path routes through wooden_crate cell; assert ObstacleManager.isPathBlocked(path) returns true for paths containing wooden_crate

loop_steps.player_action: player matches two tiles with specialBlockType === 'wave'
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: WaveBehavior.trigger(grid, midpoint(a, b), comboCount) called; 3×3 area centered on midpoint cleared of all obstacle overlays via clearObstacleAt; onWaveBuffStart(5, center) callback fires for 5s free-path-zone buff; SPECIAL_BLOCK_GENERATION_COMBO[WAVE] = 6 → auto-generated at combo=6 via ComboTracker._checkSpecialGeneration
loop_steps.state_change: all obstacles in 3×3 area around midpoint removed from obstacleMap; waveBuffActive for 5s; matched wave tiles cleared from board
loop_steps.feedback: wave ripple VFX on 3×3 area; obstacles in area clear with burst animations; HUD shows wave buff indicator for 5s; SFX: wave_clear or special_trigger
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-11: 3×3 area around match midpoint shows cleared obstacle cells (no ice/weed/crate overlays); VFX wave ring visible during animation; HUD wave buff timer visible
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert ObstacleManager.getObstacleAt returns null for all 9 cells in 3×3 area around midpoint; assert WaveBehavior.onWaveBuffStart was called with duration=5; assert matched wave tiles cleared from TileGrid

loop_steps.player_action: player matches two tiles with specialBlockType === 'light_chain'
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: LightChainBehavior.trigger: scans board for TileType with highest count (excluding isObstacle/isLocked/NONE cells); auto-clears all pairs of that type (floor(count/2) pairs); if count odd, last tile remains; SPECIAL_BLOCK_GENERATION_COMBO[LIGHT_CHAIN] = 4 → auto-generated at combo=4
loop_steps.state_change: all (or all-but-one) tiles of the dominant type cleared from TileGrid; each cleared pair: TileGrid.clearTile(pos.row, pos.col) called; objectiveProgressBar increments for each cleared pair
loop_steps.feedback: chain lightning VFX connecting all cleared pairs; rapid sequential tile disappear animations; multiple TILES_MATCHED events or single batch; SFX: chain_clear with cascading audio
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-12: dominant tile type cells all empty on board (or one remaining if odd count); chain VFX visible during animation; objectiveProgressBar shows significant jump
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert tile type with highest board count has 0 remaining instances (or 1 if original count was odd); assert LightChainBehavior cleared floor(count/2)*2 tiles; assert each cleared position has TileType.NONE

loop_steps.player_action: player matches two tiles with specialBlockType === 'cascade'
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: CascadeBehavior.trigger: auto-executes up to CASCADE_MAX_CHAINS=5 pair matches; each chain finds shortest-distance valid pair via _findBestPair (Manhattan distance); 300ms delay (CASCADE_DELAY_MS) between each; stops if no valid pair found; SPECIAL_BLOCK_GENERATION_COMBO[CASCADE] = 3 → auto-generated at combo=3
loop_steps.state_change: up to 5 pairs auto-matched with 300ms interval; each step: TileGrid.clearTile called for both tiles; each auto-match calls ComboTracker.onTileMatched() incrementing combo; movesRemaining NOT decremented for auto-matches (cascade is a single player move)
loop_steps.feedback: cascade glow VFX animates between each auto-matched pair; sequential tile clears visible; combo display may increment during cascade; SFX: cascade chain audio loop
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-13: after full cascade resolves, up to 10 additional tiles cleared (5 pairs); combo label may show elevated count; movesLabel decremented by exactly 1 (one player move triggered cascade)
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert at most 5 additional pairs were cleared after cascade trigger; assert movesRemaining decremented by 1 (not by 5+); assert each auto-match is separated by >= 280ms (timing tolerance)

loop_steps.player_action: player matches two tiles with specialBlockType === 'pierce'
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: PierceBehavior.trigger: emits onPierceBuffStart(8) → BoardEventManager.handlePierceBuff(8, callback) sets _pierceMode=true for 8s; path-finder in Pierce Mode ignores occupied cell blocks (isPassable returns true for all cells during pierce buff); pierce is editor-preset only (no auto-generation at combo threshold)
loop_steps.state_change: BoardEventManager._pierceMode = true for 8s; _pierceTickFn timer begins; matched pierce tiles cleared
loop_steps.feedback: pierce shimmer VFX on board; HUD pierce buff indicator active for 8s; tile selection and path lines may pass through occupied cells; SFX: pierce_activate
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-14: HUD shows pierce buff timer (≤8s); a path drawn through an occupied cell is visible as connection line during pierce mode
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert BoardEventManager.isPierceMode() === true immediately after pierce trigger; assert BoardEventManager.isPierceMode() === false after 8s elapsed; assert path-finder finds valid path through occupied cells during pierce mode

loop_steps.player_action: player matches two tiles with specialBlockType === 'swap'
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: SwapBehavior.trigger: calls onSwapSelectionStart(10, onSelect, onTimeout); BoardEventManager.handleSwapSelection(10, ...) sets _swapActive=true with 10s timeout; SwapSelectionOverlay activates; player taps two cells to swap their contents; if 10s elapses without selection: _swapOnTimeout called, swap tiles remain on board
loop_steps.state_change: SwapSelectionOverlay layer active; _swapActive=true; on cell selection: grid.setTile(a, cellB) + grid.setTile(b, cellA) swaps tile contents; matched swap tiles cleared
loop_steps.feedback: SwapSelectionOverlay shows semi-transparent dim (alpha=0.6) on non-selectable cells and coral_warm glow ring on selectable cells; SFX: swap_select; on timeout: timeout flash VFX; on swap completion: swap animation between two cells
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-15: SwapSelectionOverlay visible with dimmed non-selectable cells; sc-16: after swap confirmed, two cells have exchanged tile types; overlay deactivated
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert BoardEventManager.isSwapSelectionActive() === true after trigger; assert SwapSelectionOverlay node active===true; after swap: assert TileGrid.getTile(a).type === original_type_b AND TileGrid.getTile(b).type === original_type_a; assert isSwapSelectionActive() === false after swap or timeout

loop_steps.player_action: movesRemaining decrements to ≤ 5 through player matches
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: GameHUD._updateMovesLabel: if movesRemaining <= 5 AND > 0, movesLabel color changes to system_error (#E05A4A); GameSession.onMoveMade checks failure at each step; ZenModeManager checked before emitting SESSION_FAILED
loop_steps.state_change: movesLabel.color = Color(224, 90, 74, 255) (system_error); player still in 'playing' state; no board change
loop_steps.feedback: movesLabel turns red (#E05A4A); optional pulse animation on movesLabel; SFX: low_moves warning tone
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-17: movesLabel shows red color (visually distinct from neutral black) when value is 1-5; label is readable at all viewports (≥26px design size)
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert movesLabel.color equals Color(224, 90, 74, 255) when movesRemaining <= 5; assert movesRemaining is correct integer value displayed; assert GameSession.state === 'playing'

loop_steps.player_action: player clears the last tile pair — all objective tiles removed from board
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: GameSession.onObjectivesMet() called by board/objective tracker when tilesCleared >= objectiveTarget; _objectivesMet = true; _completeLevel() called; state transitions playing→levelComplete; SessionResult computed with stars (3-star: 0 continues AND movesRemaining >= 3; 2-star: 0 continues; 1-star: with continues); RewardCalculator.calculate(config, partialResult) generates material rewards; SESSION_ENDED event emitted
loop_steps.state_change: GameSession.state === 'levelComplete'; SessionResult: {levelId, completed=true, movesRemaining, comboMax, continuesUsed, reward, stars}; MaterialCollector.add(reward.materials) called
loop_steps.feedback: board cleared animation plays; LevelCompletePopup appears (z_order=20) with star rating (1-3 stars), score, material rewards displayed; backdrop dims all gameplay layers; SFX: level_complete fanfare; BGM cross-fade to victory theme
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-18: LevelCompletePopup fully visible and centered; star icons (1-3) rendered correctly; reward items displayed; backdrop dims game board; all popup content within safe area; Next Level and Back to Map buttons visible
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert GameSession.state === 'levelComplete'; assert SessionResult.completed === true; assert SessionResult.stars in [1,2,3]; assert LevelCompletePopup node active===true; assert board has 0 tiles with type !== TileType.NONE (all cleared)

loop_steps.player_action: movesRemaining reaches 0 with tiles still on board
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: GameSession.onMoveMade: _movesRemaining reaches 0 AND _objectivesMet===false AND ZenModeManager.isActive()===false → state transitions playing→failed; SESSION_FAILED event emitted; FailPopup shown
loop_steps.state_change: GameSession.state === 'failed'; SESSION_FAILED emitted; tiles remain on board; FailPopup node activated; continuesUsed < CONTINUE_MAX (3) allows Continue button to show
loop_steps.feedback: FailPopup modal appears with Continue (spend glowstones) and Exit options; backdrop dims gameplay; SFX: level_failed; board shows remaining tiles (not cleared)
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-19: FailPopup visible and centered; remaining tiles still visible on board (or board dimmed but intact); Continue button present if continuesUsed < 3; movesLabel shows 0
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert GameSession.state === 'failed'; assert movesRemaining === 0; assert FailPopup node active===true; assert at least 1 TileGrid cell has type !== TileType.NONE; assert SESSION_FAILED event was emitted

loop_steps.player_action: player taps Continue in FailPopup — spends glowstones to add 5 moves
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: GameSession.continue(glowstones): validates state==='failed', continuesUsed < CONTINUE_MAX (3), glowstones >= CONTINUE_GLOWSTONE_COST (6); _glowstones -= 6; _movesRemaining += CONTINUE_MOVES_ADDED (5); _continuesUsed++; state transitions failed→playing; returns true
loop_steps.state_change: movesRemaining += 5; continuesUsed incremented (max 3); GameSession.state === 'playing'; FailPopup dismissed
loop_steps.feedback: FailPopup dismiss animation; movesLabel shows updated count (previous + 5); glowstone balance indicator decremented by 6; board re-activates for input; SFX: continue_granted
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-20: FailPopup dismissed; board active; movesLabel shows prev_value+5; player can make another move; glowstone balance updated
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert GameSession.continue() returns true when valid; assert movesRemaining === prev_movesRemaining + 5; assert continuesUsed incremented; assert GameSession.state === 'playing'; assert GameSession.continue() returns false when continuesUsed >= 3 OR glowstones < 6

loop_steps.player_action: player taps Next Level button on LevelCompletePopup
loop_steps.rule_evaluation: director.loadScene or similar transitions to next level or island map; if final level of chapter: island restoration scene shown; chapter progress updated; SaveManager persists SessionResult to backend via PUT /v1/save/:player_id
loop_steps.state_change: GameSession state reset to 'loading' for next level; chapter_progress incremented if chapter complete; backend save triggered
loop_steps.feedback: scene fade transition via SystemOverlay (island_sand color #F7EDD8); island restoration VFX if chapter complete; NPC dialog for chapter completion narrative; new level board loads
loop_steps.screenshot_checkpoint: sc-21: next level board visible OR island restoration scene visible; SystemOverlay fade covers all layers during transition (no black gaps); chapter completion celebration animation if applicable
loop_steps.runtime_assertion: assert new TileGrid initialized with next level dimensions; assert GameSession.state === 'playing' after load; assert backend PUT /v1/save was called with correct SessionResult payload

minimum_playable_scenario.description: Clear a 4×4 grid with 8 matching pairs (4 tile types × 4 tiles each = 16 tiles = 8 pairs) using at most 20 steps — deterministic seed ensures reproducible layout
minimum_playable_scenario.expected_layout_note: BoardGenerator.generateRandom(4, 4, ['T01','T02','T03','T04'], 1) produces even-distributed 4 tiles per type, shuffled with SeededRandom(1); minimum 5 matchable pairs guaranteed by MAX_REGEN_ATTEMPTS=20 loop
minimum_playable_scenario.win_path: 8 sequential valid pair matches, all within 20 steps, 0 continues

win_condition: GameSession.onObjectivesMet() called — all objective tiles cleared (tilesCleared >= objectiveTarget); GameSession transitions to 'levelComplete'; SESSION_ENDED emitted with completed=true
lose_condition: movesRemaining === 0 AND _objectivesMet === false AND NOT ZenMode; GameSession transitions to 'failed'; SESSION_FAILED emitted
retry_condition: GameSession.continue(glowstones): spend CONTINUE_GLOWSTONE_COST=6 glowstones (source: economy-model.json continue_level cost = 6) to gain CONTINUE_MOVES_ADDED=5 extra moves; maximum CONTINUE_MAX=3 continues per level; state failed→playing
next_condition: win → director.loadScene to next level; if chapter final level: island restoration scene; SessionResult persisted via backend PUT /v1/save
progression_condition: chapter complete → island restoration scene plays; chapter_progress incremented in player save data; next chapter unlocks if island restoration objective met

special_tile_summary.effect: clear all obstacles in 3×3 area around connection midpoint; grant 5s free-path-zone buff
auto-clear all pairs of the dominant tile type on board
grant 8s pierce mode — paths may route through any occupied cell
open 10s selection window — player taps two cells to swap their contents
auto-execute up to 5 chain matches with 300ms delay between each

obstacle_rules.cleared_by: not cleared by player — must be avoided in path-finding
N direct matches on the chain_lock tile (N = obs.chains)
1 adjacent tile match per cell; expands 1 cell per turn

board_events.effect: periodic row/column wrap-shift every interval_s seconds
cells locked until required_hits adjacent matches; emits cellUnfrozen
vine expands to random adjacent cell every interval_s seconds; locks cell
TileGrid.applyGravity() after each match; ease_in_bounce animation
tagged surface cells slide tile horizontally after fall; re-gravity applied
sub-rectangle rotates 90° clockwise every N moves; warning flash for warning_flash_s before rotation

coordinate_system_ref.grid_to_board_local: x = (col + 0.5) * tile_w - board_w * 0.5; y = board_h * 0.5 - (row + 0.5) * tile_h

hud_elements_required.position_design: y = +580 to +460 from canvas center (HUD top zone)

telemetry_assertions.trigger: TileGrid.emitTilesMatched(path) called after successful pair clear

qa_run_instructions.test_environment: WebGL build served at localhost:8080; backend at localhost:3000; Playwright test runner
qa_run_instructions.pass_criteria: all loop_steps complete without assertion failure; all screenshot_checkpoints produced; telemetry_assertions verified via network intercept or console log capture
qa_run_instructions.fail_criteria: any runtime_assertion fails OR screenshot shows unexpected state OR telemetry event missing required fields
qa_run_instructions.blocked_criteria: WebGL canvas not accessible; scene fails to load; TileGrid.initialize throws; BoardGenerator produces 0 matchable pairs after MAX_REGEN_ATTEMPTS

validation_notes: All 17 loop steps mapped from actual source code: TileGrid, TileMatcher, ComboTracker, BoardEventManager, ObstacleManager, SpecialBlock, GameHUD, GameSession.
Tile type enum confirmed: T01-T20 (TileGrid.ts:TileType); minimum playable scenario uses T01-T04 for deterministic 4×4 layout.
TileMatcher.findPath implements ≤2-turn BFS with out-of-bounds perimeter traversal; path confirmed from TileMatcher.ts lines 36-111.
ComboTracker confirmed: COMBO_WINDOW_MS=2000, COMBO_MAX=6, multipliers {1:1.0, 2:1.5, 3:2.0, 4:3.0}, auto-gen thresholds {cascade:3, light_chain:4, wave:6}.
GameSession continue economics confirmed: 6 glowstones, +5 moves, max 3 continues (CONTINUE_GLOWSTONE_COST, CONTINUE_MOVES_ADDED, CONTINUE_MAX in GameSession.ts).
Star rating confirmed: 3-star requires 0 continues AND movesRemaining >= THREE_STAR_MOVES_REMAINING=3.
Obstacle blocking rules confirmed: wooden_crate and water_current block paths; ice_block blocks selection not path; weed clears by 1 adjacent; chain_lock requires N direct matches.
Special tiles confirmed: Wave (3×3 obstacle clear + 5s buff), LightChain (auto-clear dominant type), Pierce (8s path-through mode), Swap (10s selection window), Cascade (≤5 auto-matches × 300ms).
HUD elements confirmed: movesLabel (red at ≤5), comboLabel (format 'xN M.M×', visible at combo≥2), objectiveProgressBar, pauseButton/shopButton.
Coordinate system confirmed from view-mode-runtime-contract.json: board 528×528 at y=-30, tile 66px, row-major 0-indexed.
E2E test file confirmed at game-client/e2e/glow-island.spec.ts with canvas coordinate click helpers; screenshot output to .allforai/bootstrap/e2e-screenshots/.
BoardGenerator confirmed: MIN_MATCHABLE_PAIRS=5 guaranteed by MAX_REGEN_ATTEMPTS=20; SeededRandom LCG with provided seed produces deterministic layout.
Telemetry assertions cover all observable game events: level_start, match_made, combo_reached, special_tile_triggered, obstacle_cleared, level_failed, level_complete, continue_used.
